'''Uridia''' was one of the many lifeless [[Moon/Legends|moons]] which [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] the single [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] in the [[Uridia system/Legends|Uridia system]].

==History==
Most of the [[Moon/Legends|moon's]] surface was [[Mining/Legends|strip-mined]] of [[uridium]] during the reign of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], although a huge explosion at one of the mines destroyed nearly thirty percent of the moon's matter some [[29 BBY/Legends|32]] [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. At some point the moon was abandoned.<ref name="Ando" />

After the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] took power, it rediscovered the moon, planning to use [[Andoan mineral-fish]] to extract the volatile uridium. In order to protect the lab, the Empire surrounded the moon with a network of sixteen [[DTX detector satellite]]s. They called this the [[Ando Project]].<ref name="Ando" />

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|11|The Ando Project}}
